title: Campfire Plus│營火熔煉加強
description: Makes some items and blocks smeltable in the Campfire for faster smelting.│使某些物品和方塊可以在營火中熔煉，從而加快熔煉速度。
body:
# Function│功能
**This data pack allows the following items, which could originally be smelted in a furnace, to also be smelted over a campfire.│這個資料包讓以下原本能在熔爐中熔煉的物品也能在營火中熔煉。**
- **Cactus│仙人掌** -> **Green Dye│綠色染料**
- **Sea Pickle│海泡菜** -> **Lime Dye│淺綠色染料**
- **Chorus Fruit│紫頌果** -> **Popped Chorus Fruit│爆裂的紫頌果**
- **Wet Sponge│濕海綿** -> **Sponge│海綿**
- **Resin Clump│樹酯團** -> **Resin Brick│樹酯磚**
# Idea Source│想法來源
This data pack is inspired by [Smoking Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smoking-plus), and it simply replaces all the smokehouse recipes in [Smoking Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smoking-plus) with campfire recipes.│這個資料包的想法來源於 [Smoking Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smoking-plus) ，此資料包僅將 [Smoking Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/smoking-plus) 裡所有的煙燻爐配方改為營火配方。
